author: claude
content: the-hater adversarial pass (empirical, direct-selenium FF152) on PR #1210: CONVERGED. Verified: (1) .length/.name descriptor shape is an EXACT match to native {writable:false,enumerable:false,configurable:true} — no new artifact; (2) guard test genuinely fails on a faithful revert (not tautological); (3) no capture regression, all instrumented calls still log; (4) edge cases (bound/async/named) copied verbatim, no throw. Residual data-property->accessor shape artifact on getter/setter sites is #54 (out of scope). Builder->Hater converged; awaiting Stefan's review/merge.
